references.summary: Standard wrapper for two or more page-level Data Filter controls. It preserves the Event Portfolio filter-group visual contract while allowing each child filter to be mapped to the generated app's source list, field, label, placeholder, and downstream consumers.
references.whenToUse: Use whenever a generated Dashboard, custom Data List form, Approval submission form, Approval task form, Data list workflow task form, or Schedule workflow task form contains two or more page-level Data Filter controls.
references.whenNotToUse: Do not use for a single page-level filter, and do not use it for local toolbar search boxes inside Collection templates.
lockedContract: child filter dropdown body shadow and radius
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: When a page or form plans two or more page-level Data Filter controls, the App Plan must state that the filters use dashboard_standard_filter_group.
references.generationProof: Generated-final validation must prove every page with two or more page-level Data Filter controls wraps those filters in dashboard_standard_filter_group and preserves the locked visual/filter contract.
references.proofBoundary: This template validates export-shape placement and filter-control contract. Runtime data changes still require explicit browser/runtime proof.
